welcome.badge: A smarter way to choose where Europe fits you
welcome.subtitle: Not another travel list. Eurovibe turns a feeling into a personal trip profile — then helps you discover, enter, simulate and compare European destinations before you go.

settings.languageHint: Switch the interface language and direction.

mood.title: What do you need from this trip?
mood.subtitle: Start with the feeling. We'll help turn it into the right destination.
mood.describe: Describe it in your own words…  (e.g. cheap, queer-friendly, alive at night)
mood.toast: Choose at least one vibe to start
mood.pickHint: Pick as many as you like

cheap-escape.title: Cheap Escape
cheap-escape.cue: Stretch every euro, keep it simple.

queer-friendly.title: More Queer-Friendly
queer-friendly.cue: Visible, welcoming, safe to be you.

solo-not-lonely.title: Solo but Not Lonely
solo-not-lonely.cue: Easy to meet people, easy to feel safe.

beautiful-easy.title: Beautiful & Easy
beautiful-easy.cue: Postcard views, low effort, smooth days.
